Title: Manager, Data Control & Data Science
Company: Công Ty Cổ Phần Đầu Tư Nam Long
Location: Tòa nhà Capital Tower, 6 Nguyễn Khắc Viện, Tân Phú, Q.7, Tầng 11 Tòa nhà Capital Tower, 6 Nguyễn Khắc Viện, Tân Phú, Q 7
Job Description:
Overview
Manager, Data Control & Data Science, spearhead data-driven initiatives by leading and developing a high-performing team of data Lakehouse and big query for analysts, be responsible for shaping and implementing NLG data strategy, ensuring data quality and security, and overseeing the development and deployment of advanced analytics solutions to drive business insights and decision-making.

Responsibility
1. Data Control & Data Science
- Data Strategy & Architecture: Define and implement a robust data strategy aligned with business objectives, including data collection, storage, integration, and governance.
- Data Warehousing & Lakehouse: Oversee the design, development, and maintenance of data warehousing and lake house solutions on AWS or Google Cloud, ensuring scalability, performance, and data integrity.
- Data Modeling & Governance: Establish and enforce data modeling standards, best practices, and governance frameworks to ensure data quality, consistency, and compliance.
- Advanced Analytics & Insights: Lead the development and deployment of advanced analytics models, including data mining, big data analysis, and machine learning, to uncover actionable insights and drive business value.
- Stakeholder Collaboration: Partner with business stakeholders to understand their data needs and translate them into actionable data science projects and solutions. Communicate complex technical findings in a clear and concise manner to both technical and non-technical audiences.
- Technology & Innovation: Continuously evaluate and adopt cutting-edge technologies in the data science and cloud computing domains to maintain a competitive advantage.

2. Digital Transformation Projects:
- Technology & Innovation:
- Continuously evaluate and adopt cutting-edge technologies in the data science, cloud computing, and digital transformation domains to ensure the company stays ahead of the curve.
- Drive the implementation of innovative data-driven solutions that enable new business models, enhance customer experiences, and improve operational efficiency.

3. Data Analytics & Insights for Digital Transformation:
- Lead the development and deployment of advanced Data analytics models, including data mining, big data analysis, and machine learning, to support digital transformation initiatives.
- Identify key performance indicators (KPIs) and develop dashboards to track and measure the impact of digital transformation efforts.
- Provide insights and recommendations to guide strategic decision-making and optimize business processes.

4. Change Management:
- Develop and manage a centralized change management process for Data initiatives.
- Ensure all changes are thoroughly tested, documented, and communicated to stakeholders.
- Monitor and control change requests to minimize disruption data structure and ensure successful implementation.
- Conduct change impact assessments and develop mitigation strategies.

5. Change Control:
- Establish change control procedures to manage Data changes effectively.
- Ensure changes are aligned with business objectives and do not compromise security or compliance.
- Maintain a change control log and ensure proper documentation for all changes.
- Conduct post-implementation reviews to assess the success of changes and identify areas for improvement.

6. Data Modeling & Governance:
- Establish and enforce data modeling standards, best practices, and governance frameworks to ensure data quality, consistency, and compliance throughout the digital transformation journey.
- Champion data-driven decision-making and promote a culture of data literacy across the organization.
- Work closely with business leaders and cross-functional teams to understand their digital transformation goals and translate them into actionable data science projects.
- Communicate complex technical findings in a clear and concise manner to both technical and non-technical stakeholders, fostering understanding and buy-in.

7. User Training and Support:
- Train end-users on how to use dashboards and interpret the data presented.
- Provide ongoing support and enhancements to dashboards based on user feedback.
- Develop documentation and training materials for dashboard users.

8. Team Management:
- Lead, mentor, and develop a high-performing IT governance and PMO team.
- Set performance goals and conduct regular performance reviews.
- Foster a collaborative and innovative team culture across all IT functions
- Provide coaching and support to team members to help them achieve their career goals.

9. Professional Development:
- Team Leadership & Development: Foster a collaborative and high-performing team culture. Provide mentorship, guidance, and opportunities for professional growth to data scientists and analysts.
- Encourage a culture of compliance, governance, and accountability within the team.
- Identify training needs and provide opportunities for skill development for all Data team members & system users.
- Stay updated on industry trends and best practices to ensure the team remains competitive and knowledgeable.

Title: Manager, Project Management
Company: Công Ty Cổ Phần Đầu Tư Nam Long
Location: Khu đô thị PG, An Đồng, An Dương, Hải Phòng, Việt Nam, Tầng 11 Tòa nhà Capital Tower, 6 Nguyễn Khắc Viện, Tân Phú, Q 7
Job Description:
Over view: This position work for Nam Long ADC and onsite at Hai Phong city

1. Lead and guide Project Management/ Construction Management (PMCM) to ensure that projects are executed on schedule, with quality, and within budget.
2. Coordinate and manage overall project-related activities involving functional divisions (Planning & Budget, Research & Development, Sales & Marketing, Project Legal, Cost & Contract Management, etc.) and other units.

Responsibility
1. Establish strategic objectives, budgets, processes, and procedures
- Build, develop, and implement medium- and long-term strategic plans for projects.
- Establish policies, processes, procedures, etc., to ensure project efficiency.

2. Project Management
- Control the overall project schedule and plan.
- Manage the list of main contractors and subcontractors (define responsibilities, provide consultation, selection, bid analysis and recommendations for selection, prepare contracts, verify completed tasks, ensure compliance with HSE regulations, process payments, and evaluations).
- Prepare cost estimates, budgets, and cash flow; monitor capital sources and manage cost control.
- Execute necessary legal procedures during construction and acceptance into usage for the project to ensure compliance with construction laws.
- Evaluate payment/settlement and advance certificates submitted by contractors.
- Manage the implementation of approved contract conditions/technical instructions.

3. Design Management
- Control the issuance of designs (monitor design drawings and approvals from relevant parties).
- Manage changes, additional requests, and variations proposed by contractors.
- Review design aspects that may impact the quality, functionality, cost, or project completion timeline.
- Oversee the implementation of construction designs by contractors and consultants, ensuring compliance with approved basic designs, standards, and regulations issued by the government.
- Lead design and technical meetings between the investor and consultants or contractors during project implementation and construction phases.
- Organize the approval of all finishing materials and equipment (ensure timely submission of material samples and equipment in accordance with the approved supply and material plan).
- Manage design-related costs to ensure designs remain within the approved construction budget.

4. Construction Management
- Oversee the activities of supervision consultants and contractors regarding progress, costs, quality, occupational safety, environmental sanitation, fire prevention, and contractor compliance with contractual terms.
- Attend coordination meetings during the construction phase.
- Conduct regular inspections of construction quality and safety, and document the evaluation results.
- Organize and participate in acceptance inspections prior to the handover of products.

5. Other Responsibilities
- Be responsible for and accountable to authorities regarding the licensing and approval processes required for issuing land ownership certificates to customers.
- Participate and coordinate with relevant parties to hand over public utilities and project infrastructure to authorities in compliance with legal regulations.

Title: Senior Accountant
Company: Bosch Home Appliances Vietnam
Location: Tầng 8, Tháp B, Khu thương mại dịch vụ kết hợp nhà ở cao tầng tại Lô đất 1-13 thuộc Khu chức năng số 1 - Số 15 đường Trần Bạch Đằng, Khu phố 3, Phường Thủ Thiêm, Thành phố Thủ Đức, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam, Tầng 8, Tháp B, Khu thương mại dịch vụ kết hợp nhà ở cao tầng tại Lô đất 1-13 thuộc Khu chức năng số 1 - Số 15 đường Trần Bạch Đằng, Khu phố 3, Phường Thủ Thiêm, Thành phố Thủ Đức, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam
Job Description:
About the Senior Accountant
Reporting directly to Head of Finance and Controlling, Senior Accountant will be responsible for all accounting and tax areas of the Company.

Key Responsibilities

Accounting
• Responsible for all general ledger and accounting activities, including but not limited to Accounts Payables, Accounts Receivables including cash collection & following up, prepayment, journals, accruals and provisions
• Ensure compliance with Tax, VAS and Group regulations
• Liaise with relevant government authorities relating to accounting and finance matters
• Act as an accounting partner with all business stakeholders
Treasury
• Handle all bank-related matters
• Perform & review all clearing of incoming cash & outgoing cash
• Responsible for all other treasury related queries
Projects
• Other ad-hoc projects

Title: Logistics & Trade Supervisor
Company: Piaggio Vietnam Co., Ltd (Pvn)
Location: Lot M, Binh Xuyen IZ, Huong Canh Town, Binh Xuyen District, Vinhphuc, Vietnam, Hà Nội, BIDV Tower - Hanoi; Factory in Vinh Phuc; Commercial Office in HCMC
Job Description:
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:
• Supervise customer order handling for APAC and Vietnam markets, ensuring compliance with group policies.
• Coordinate cross‑functionally to manage daily inquiries on orders, part codes, ETA, stock levels, and credit lines; ensure accurate information flow.
• Work with warehouses to secure on‑schedule processing and shipment per agreed shipping modes; monitor daily progress.
• Oversee MIV export processes for APAC & VN; identify and resolve critical shipment issues.
• Review/approve export shipping documents; liaise with customs and forwarders for clearance and delivery.
• Coordinate with agents, suppliers, and MOIT for CO dossiers (Indonesia, Thailand, China).
• Check and confirm BL; supervise courier handling and document control; validate Export Control Sheet updates.
• Review forwarder debit notes/statements; ensure timely payment requests; manage customer complaints/claims resolution.
• Work with Procurement & suppliers on imports; supervise end‑to‑end import flow and mitigate issues.
• Review/approve import shipping documents; coordinate customs clearance and delivery to PVN; manage CO collection and tax refund process.
• Ensure accurate Import Control Sheet updates; check/approve debit notes for payment
• Direct preparation of homologation dossiers (Wheel/Tire/Battery/Mirror/Headlamp/Engine/Frame); coordinate conformity testing with Vietnam Registry; secure daily control‑sheet updates.
• Validate B13–A41 cross‑check (clearance/liquid dates, quantities, refundable materials); approve complete B13 refund dossiers (contracts, POs, sales, payments, banking, accounting).
• Prepare/review monthly reports on import/export and homologation; verify forwarder reports (Detail Declaration/AMA/Cancellation/CO delay); submit to Controlling/Tax.

Location: Tòa Nhà Số 9 Phố Đào Duy Anh, Quận Đống Đa, Hà Nội, Tầng 6, Tòa Nhà Số 9 Phố Đào Duy Anh, Quận Đống Đa, Hà Nội
Job Description:
Để đáp ứng nhu cầu phát triển, Trung tâm Hòa giải Việt Nam - VMC trực thuộc VIAC đang có nhu cầu tuyển dụng 01 nhân sự phát triển thị trường làm việc tại Trụ sở VMC tại Hà Nội.

1.1. Phát triển thị trường & chăm sóc khách hàng
• Triển khai các hoạt động quảng bá dịch vụ hòa giải của VMC tới doanh nghiệp, luật sư, hiệp hội ngành hàng, tổ chức quốc tế và các đối tác chiến lược.
• Tìm kiếm và mở rộng tệp khách hàng mới; duy trì, chăm sóc và gia tăng mức độ gắn kết với khách hàng hiện hữu.
1.2. Truyền thông & Nội dung (Digital & Offline)
• Xây dựng và vận hành kế hoạch truyền thông cho VMC trên các kênh: Website, Fanpage, YouTube, LinkedIn…
• Tổ chức, viết bài PR, tin tức, thông cáo báo chí; biên tập nội dung video, bản tin, tài liệu truyền thông.
• Quản lý hình ảnh thương hiệu và đảm bảo nội dung truyền thông tuân thủ chuẩn mực pháp lý – chuyên môn của VIAC/VMC.
1.3. Quan hệ báo chí & đối ngoại
• Duy trì quan hệ với các cơ quan báo chí, truyền thông; phối hợp triển khai các chiến dịch truyền thông theo kế hoạch.
• Chuẩn bị nội dung, tài liệu, thông điệp truyền thông phục vụ lãnh đạo khi phát biểu tại sự kiện.
1.4. Chăm sóc Hòa giải viên và chuyên gia VMC
• Hỗ trợ xây dựng, cập nhật dữ liệu thông tin chuyên môn của Hòa giải viên.
• Điều phối, chăm sóc và duy trì kết nối giữa Hòa giải viên với VMC.
1.5. Các nhiệm vụ khác
• Các nhiệm vụ khác phù hợp với chuyên môn theo sự phân công của VIAC.

Title: Learning and Development Senior Associate
Company: Wha Vietnam
Location: Tầng 4, Tháp 2, Capital Place, Số 29 Liễu Giai, Phường Ngọc Hà, Hanoi, Thanh Hoa, Nghe An
Job Description:
Overall governance
• Ensure understanding of Learning & Development (L&D) policies, standards, and guidelines, to provide guidelines to junior members.
• Support periodic revision of policies, standards, guidelines, work processes and procedures that are relevant to L&OD work, to ensure efficient operation and alignment with company’s policies & compliance with relevant governance.

Function-related accountabilities
• Ensure the alignment of L&D directions and plans with WHA Group
• Design and update training materials (slides, handbooks, e-learning content)
• Coordinate internal and external training programs, including logistics registration, venue, materials, communication.
• Collect and analyze feedback data, prepare reports, and highlight insights to improve learning effectiveness.
• Process payment requests, reimbursements, and vendor invoices related to L&D activities.
• Identify and document learning needs; develop training plans assist in data preparation for LNAs, IDPs, and competency assessments.
• Design and update training materials (slides, handbooks, e-learning content)
• Manage orientation training, compulsory courses and oversee entry-level soft skills programs, while seeking guidance from the L&D Manager, from needs identification to evaluation.
• Prepare and submit required training records and documents to the Department of Skill Development, including course/trainer registration and tax incentive reports, to ensure compliance.
• Participate in pilot projects and contribute ideas for Academy initiatives (microlearning, knowledge-sharing, innovation labs).
• Support career development and succession planning initiatives
• Assist in building a learning culture within the organization

Other accountabilities
• Guide, if needed, junior members in performing their tasks to ensure consistent understanding and ability to perform tasks.
• Contribute, if needed, to the implementation of small to medium strategic projects, in order to support more senior members in documentation or reporting of performance.
• Engage in regular meetings/updates with team members, collect feedback, encourage and promote team spirit.

Title: COO
Company: Page Group Vietnam
Job Description:
The Chief Operating Officer (COO) role in the not-for-profit sector focuses on driving operational excellence and ensuring alignment with the organization's mission and goals. This is a permanent opportunity for a dedicated leader to oversee strategic initiatives and daily operations effectively.


Description

As COO, you will oversee all non-academic functions across our network of schools ensuring every campus is safe, well‑run, future‑ready, and aligned to our mission. You will lead regional operations closely with the CEO and Chief Education Officer, and deliver scalable systems that support academic excellence and organizational growth. This is a rare opportunity to influence the learning journey of thousands of young people worldwide.

 * Lead daily operational performance across all schools, ensuring high standards of safety, quality, and service.
 * Implement scalable systems and processes that support growth across multiple countries.
 * Drive continuous improvement and operational efficiency across facilities, technology, HR operations, procurement, and support services.
 * Strengthen organizational culture developing high‑performing leaders and unified ways of working across regions.
 * Partner with the CEO, CFO, and education leaders to align operations with strategic goals.
 * Oversee risk management, compliance, safeguarding, and crisis readiness.
 * Guide capital planning, infrastructure investment, and long-term resource strategy.
 * Lead innovation in digital transformation, data systems, and operational best practice.


Profile

You are a seasoned operator with experience leading complex, multi-site organizations ideally across international markets. You thrive in fast-growing environments, build strong teams, and bring clarity, structure, and forward-thinking leadership.

You have:

 * 10+ years of senior operational leadership experience in K12 International school
 * A track record of building scalable systems and high-performing teams
 * Strong financial and strategic acumen
 * Resilience, cultural agility, and the ability to lead with empathy and purpose
 * A passion for education and making a positive impact at scale


Job Offer

Our client offers you:

 

 * Influence the future of education across multiple campuses
 * Work with passionate educators and mission-driven leaders
 * Competitive executive compensation and relocation support

This is an excellent opportunity for an experienced COO to make a meaningful impact. If you are ready to take on this challenge, we encourage you to apply today.

Title: Business Development Lead (Pharmaceuticals)
Company: A France Pharmaceutical Company
Location: Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam, HCMC, Vietnam
Job Description:
Job Summary
The Business Development Lead is responsible for supporting the identification and development of new business opportunities through market analysis, commercial assessment, business case preparation, and coordination of new product or project launches.
This role contributes to the expansion and optimization of the company’s product portfolio in pharmaceuticals, cosmeceuticals, and healthcare products, across ETC (hospital), OTC (pharmacy), and retail channels.

Responsibilities
1. Portfolio Strategy:
• Collect and consolidate market information to identify potential new product opportunities or business initiatives in the pharmaceutical and healthcare sectors.
• Monitor market trends, customer needs, and competitor activities to detect emerging opportunities.
• Identify potential product categories, market segments, or therapeutic areas aligned with the company’s business direction.
2. Market Assessment:
• Conduct market analysis to evaluate market size, growth potential, and competitive landscape.
• Assess the commercial attractiveness of potential opportunities by analyzing factors such as:
◦ market demand
◦ competitive intensity
◦ pricing trends
◦ accessibility of distribution channels
• Prepare market assessment reports to support internal evaluation of new opportunities.
3. Business Case Development:
• Develop business cases for potential product opportunities or new business initiatives.
• Collaborate with the Finance team to prepare financial projections, including revenue, cost, and profitability estimates.
• Support the preparation of business proposals and presentations for internal decision-making
4. Project Launch & Execution Support:
• Coordinate with relevant departments to support the preparation and launch of new products or business projects.
• Track project progress and assist in coordinating cross-functional activities during the implementation phase.
• Support the resolution of operational issues that may arise during project execution.
• Assist in the handover of projects to the commercial teams for ongoing business operations.

Title: Senior Digital Application Developer
Company: Pepperl+Fuchs Vietnam Co., Ltd
Location: HCMC, Vietnam, Lot S12-16a, Street 20, Tan Thuan EPZ, Tan Thuan Dong Ward, District 7
Job Description:
Role Purposes:

Gather requirements, conceptualize, develop, implement, rollout data analytic and digital solutions within P+F operations to gain business insight and improve productivity

Major Accountabilities:

MAIN FUNCTIONAL ROLES:
• Develop data analytic solution following extract-load-transform (ELT) pipeline:
o Work with stakeholder to analyse business requirements for data analytics
o Work with relevant partner from OT & IT to gather and extract the required data into suitable location (data warehouse, data lake)
o Transform the data with both code (SQL-like transform) and low-code solution
o Visualize data based on business requirement
o Train & work with end user to use data for business improvement
• Develop digital application (low-code app):
o Work with stake holder to analyse requirement for application, incl. cost & benefits.
o Form technical concept and architecture to enable reliable & execution
o Develop, test, integration, maintain, improve, rollout with the target to have digitalized, smart and automated processes
• Work with IT/OT to ensure the agreed performance targets (SLQ) of infrastructure which support application & data pipeline:
o Familiar with DevOps concept to work with OT and IT partners for troubleshooting & ensure the continuous reliability of All the applications.
o Develop test cases, conduct SIT and UAT, load test and tune the performance of systems to meet SLA.
• Work with internal and external developers and supplier on IT hardware topic to support digital solution

SUPPORTING FUNCTIONAL ROLES:
• Lead & support roll-out project of digital solution to global locations
• Lead & support consultants to identify & formulate customer requirements e.g. user stories
• Develop SLA and obtain the consensus with business users

STANDARDS AND SUSTAINABILITY:
• Design and optimization of documentation for all solutions.
• Training and further education of employees regarding SF solutions
• Supervision of Developers, Interns and Trainees

Title: Deputy Director, Research And Development
Company: Công Ty Cổ Phần Đầu Tư Nam Long
Location: Tòa nhà Capital Tower, 6 Nguyễn Khắc Viện, Tân Phú, Q 7, Tầng 11 Tòa nhà Capital Tower, 6 Nguyễn Khắc Viện, Tân Phú, Q 7
Job Description:
***Overview:
Deputy Director, Research and Development is responsible for implementing and managing market research activities to support projects developed by NLL and NLCP, as well as macro-level studies and forecasts for the Group. Key responsibilities include:
• Conducting macroeconomic research, trend analysis, and forecasting to support the Group’s strategic planning.
• Researching and developing products and services based on company direction and business needs.
• Preparing market research reports.
Collaborate proactively with cross-functional teams to ensure the successful and timely delivery of assigned objectives.

***Responsibility:

A. Performance:
1. Conduct macroeconomic, industry, and economic trend research:
• Perform macro-level research and analyze monetary, fiscal, and other policy trends to forecast economic cycles.
• Study industry dynamics and trends to assess sector outlooks and emerging developments, supporting the Group’s strategic planning.
• Propose the selection of external consultants and manage the process and outcomes of outsourced research projects related to R&D.

2. Conduct customer and market research, competitor analysis, and product proposals:
• Conduct competitor research and analysis; propose product types, pricing, features, and amenities.
• Conduct research on target customers to define customer personas, behaviors, and satisfaction levels.
• Analyze market data to recommend pricing strategies for each sales phase, or provide counter-arguments to proposed pricing from the Sales & Marketing Division.
• Prepare reports proposing product mix, product descriptions, and associated amenities for each project.

3. Monitor Progress and Ensure Quality:
• Closely monitor the progress and quality of assigned tasks to ensure timely and accurate completion.
• Provide guidance, feedback, and timely support to ensure the quality of work delivered by team members.
• Develop annual work plans and oversee their implementation within the department.

4. Budget Management:
• Develop and submit the department’s annual budget for approval.
• Manage and plan the department’s annual operating budget in line with the company’s overall objectives, ensuring cost-efficiency and effectiveness.

5. Relationship Management:
• Establish and maintain strong working relationships with Business Units, Centers of Excellence, and other departments across the Group.
• Build and maintain relationships with external partners, consultants, and vendors.

B. Health:
6. Team Development & People Management:
• Work closely with Centers of Excellence to continuously enhance professional knowledge and technical expertise.
• Provide training, development, motivation, and career advancement opportunities for team members.
• Engage in direct communication to improve and strengthen team members’ skills and performance.
• Uphold corporate culture and proactively propose initiatives to further improve and elevate team engagement and effectiveness.
• Participate in developing and standardizing procedures and SOPs to ensure effective task execution.

7. Workplace Culture & Environment Management:
• Foster a professional working spirit and uphold integrity within the department.
• Proactively address and resolve internal conflicts to maintain a safe, healthy, and positive work environment.
• Sustain team discipline, cohesion, and collaboration.

Title: Executive Assistant To C-Level Executive
Company: Công Ty Cổ Phần Giáo Dục Millennia
Location: Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam, 179 Đường Võ Nguyên Giáp, An Khanh, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
Job Description:
POSITION OVERVIEW
The Executive Assistant will serve as the strategic partner and primary point of leverage for a C-Level Executive. This is a high-impact, demanding role that requires a unique blend of sharp intellect, organizational mastery, and the assertive professional strength necessary to drive execution and interface effectively with the BOD/BOM. The ideal candidate will be a proactive problem-solver, highly articulate, and possess the finesse to represent the Executive while maintaining rigorous standards of productivity.
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
1. Strategic Execution & Project Oversight (The "Push"):
• Act as the Executive's central point of contact for internal project coordination and execution tracking.
• Proactively "Push" and follow up with department heads and cross-functional teams to ensure all assigned tasks, initiatives, and strategic goals are progressing on schedule and meeting established deadlines.
• Support the preparation of materials for the BOD and BOM, ensuring all reports, presentations, and meeting logistics are handled with precision and discretion.
• Monitor, track, and report on the status of key company initiatives, highlighting potential bottlenecks and risks for immediate Executive review.
2. Executive Support & Time Management:
• Manage a dynamic and complex calendar, prioritizing meetings, appointments, and travel logistics with precision.
• Handle sensitive and confidential information with the utmost discretion and professionalism.
• Prepare the Executive for meetings by compiling all necessary materials, agendas, and pre-reading documentation, ensuring the Executive is fully briefed.
• Screen and prioritize incoming correspondence (emails, calls), drafting professional responses on behalf of the Executive when appropriate.
3. Professional Representation & Communication:
• Serve as a professional and personable gatekeeper, managing communication flow between the Executive and internal/external stakeholders, including key members of the BOD/BOM.
• Maintain a consistently pleasant and approachable demeanor (easy-on-the-eye/presentable, gentle speaking), while possessing the underlying confidence and authority necessary to effectively liaise with senior management.
4. Personal Assistance (As Needed/In Case):
• Provide support for reasonable personal administrative tasks that intersect with the Executive's professional schedule, on a case-by-case basis (in case).
• Assist with managing personal appointments, reservations, and errands as required to optimize the Executive's overall schedule and focus.
• Coordinate private travel arrangements (booking flights, accommodation, transportation) as an extension of professional duties.

Company: Công Ty TNHH Spin Master (Việt Nam)/spin Master (Vietnam) LTD CO.,

Job Description:
Are you a kid at heart looking to build a career with a leading global children's toy, entertainment and digital gaming company?

We are growing faster than ever! Spin Master is expanding its team and opening numerous positions across multiple departments. If you are looking for an exciting career move, submit your CV today to be considered for an interview. Successful candidates will have their start dates arranged in coordination with our ongoing expansion timeline!

HOW WILL YOU CREATE IMPACT?

As part of the Asia Operations Team, you will report to the Manager, Engineering in carrying out full product development activities and provide engineering support at vendors for engineering builds and debug to meet the product specifications, cost and schedule.

• To work with vendors and Headquarter on the product design to hit the target cost
• To carry out product development, engineering, and debug to meet product specifications and aesthetic requirements
• To handle the consigned material, and special components sourcing and cost negotiation
• To provide technical support and debug as needed on consigned materials
• To provide support to internal groups on any production output issues and material authorization review
• To monitor the schedule and provide on-site support from development start to OSD
• To provide manufacturing support as needed after Production Start
• Must have experience in plastics and plastic injection molding

Candidate with strong experience can be considered for higher position

Title: Phó Giám Đốc Ban Tài Chính (Fund Raising)
Company: Công Ty Cổ Phần Tập Đoàn Meey Land
Location: 99 Láng Hạ, Đống Đa, Hà Nội, 5th Floor Petrowaco Building, 97 – 99 Lang Ha Street, Dong Da District - Hanoi.
Job Description:
Hỗ trợ CFO trong công tác huy động vốn và chiến lược tài chính:
• Nghiên cứu, đề xuất các phương án huy động vốn phù hợp với chiến lược phát triển của công ty (vốn cổ phần, trái phiếu, quỹ đầu tư, vay ngân hàng, M&A,…)
• Tham gia xây dựng chiến lược tài chính dài hạn, đảm bảo dòng vốn ổn định cho hoạt động kinh doanh và mở rộng quy mô công ty
• Tìm kiếm, kết nối và làm việc với các quỹ đầu tư, tổ chức tài chính, ngân hàng để huy động vốn
• Hỗ trợ chuẩn bị hồ sơ, tài liệu kêu gọi đầu tư, đàm phán với nhà đầu tư tiềm năng
Quản lý và tối ưu hóa nguồn vốn
• Theo dõi, phân tích và đề xuất các giải pháp tối ưu dòng tiền, cân đối nguồn vốn để đảm bảo tính thanh khoản cho công ty
• Kiểm soát hiệu quả sử dụng vốn, đánh giá các khoản vay, dòng tiền từ nhà đầu tư để đảm bảo tính bền vững tài chính
• Hỗ trợ CFO trong việc lập kế hoạch tài chính, dự báo dòng tiền và rủi ro tài chính
• Đánh giá, đề xuất chiến lược phân bổ vốn hợp lý giữa các mảng hoạt động của công ty
Phân tích tài chính và đầu tư
• Thực hiện phân tích tài chính doanh nghiệp, đánh giá hiệu quả sử dụng vốn và đề xuất phương án cải thiện
• Hỗ trợ CFO trong việc chuẩn bị các báo cáo tài chính, báo cáo gọi vốn, hồ sơ IPO nếu có
• Theo dõi và phân tích thị trường tài chính, bất động sản, công nghệ để tham mưu chiến lược gọi vốn & đầu tư
• Hỗ trợ công tác M&A, đánh giá doanh nghiệp, định giá startup công nghệ bất động sản khi cần thiết
Hỗ trợ làm việc với đối tác, nhà đầu tư và các tổ chức tài chính
• Chuẩn bị tài liệu, báo cáo tài chính và tham gia các cuộc họp với nhà đầu tư, quỹ đầu tư, ngân hàng
• Đàm phán điều khoản đầu tư, điều kiện tín dụng, đảm bảo lợi ích tối ưu cho công ty
• Duy trì và phát triển mối quan hệ với các tổ chức tài chính, quy đầu tư trong và ngoài nước
• Hỗ trợ xây dựng và duy trì chiến lược IR (quan hệ nhà đầu tư), đảm bảo minh bạch tài chính và nâng cao giá trị cho doanh nghiệp
Hỗ trợ các công việc khác theo yêu cầu của CFO
• Hỗ trợ CFO trong công tác quản lý tài chính, kế toán, kiểm toán
• Xây dựng các báo cáo quản trị tài chính, phục vụ công tác điều hành cấp cao
• Tham gia lập kế hoạch ngân sách, tối ưu hóa chi phí tài chính của Công ty.

Title: HR and Administrative Assistant
Company: Matson Navigation Inc.
Location: 5h Floor, No. 45, Vo Thi Sau Street, Tan Dinh War, HCMC
Job Description:
This role will comprehensively manage the company's human resources, covering recruitment, compensation and benefits, employee relations, and team building. This position will directly participate in implementing the company's talent strategy, ensuring HR policies comply with Vietnam's labor regulations, and driving improvements in employee satisfaction and organizational effectiveness.

1. Recruitment Management‌
· Execute end-to-end recruitment processes, including job posting, resume screening, interview scheduling, and hiring decisions, to ensure timely fulfillment of staffing needs across departments.
· Maintain employee documentation and ensure compliance with local labor law.
· Keep the employees’ profiles updated and completed based on the HR policy (both hard copies and soft copies).
2. Compensation, Benefits & Employee Welfare‌
· Handle attendance, monthly payroll calculation, and disbursement, ensuring compliance.
· Assist in formulating competitive salary structures that comply with local market standards and labor laws.
· Administer employee benefit plans, including social insurance, health insurance, and transportation allowances.
· Providing assistance to employees regarding compensation and welfare inquiries.
3. Employee Relations
· Handling employment contracts and onboard process and leaving procedures in accordance with Vietnam's Labor Code.
· Organize employee activities and team-building initiatives, such as training sessions, cultural events, and communication meetings, to enhance team cohesion.
· Coordinate the resolution of employee complaints, grievances, and labor disputes, thereby improving employee satisfaction and fostering a positive work environment.
4. Training & Development
· Be responsible for New Hire Training.
· Assist in formulating the annual training plan and support employee career development.
5. Administrative Assistant Responsibilities
· Handle daily office administrative tasks, including but not limited to receiving visitors, answering phone calls, managing mail and couriers, procuring and managing office supplies, and arranging and recording meetings.
· Coordinate and maintain office environment and facilities, ensuring a tidy, safe, and fully functional workspace, and optimizing the use of office space and equipment.
· Perform various administrative duties, such as document organization, data entry, drafting and archiving routine correspondence, and providing travel arrangement support to ensure efficient administrative and logistical support for all departments.
· Assist in organizing company internal events and meetings, responsible for logistical support including venue booking, material preparation, and catering arrangements.
6. Others
· Collaborate across departments to support administrative and logistical tasks (e.g., office environment optimization), ensuring efficient operations.
· Any other special job tasks as designated by line manager.

Title: Key Account Manager - Ecom
Company: Công Ty TNHH Kimberly-Clark Việt Nam
Location: Ho Chi Minh, 18th floor, E.Town Central Building, 11 Doan Van Bo, ward 12, D4, HCMC
Job Description:
1. Position Summary
We are looking for a highly driven and experienced Key Account Manager (KAM) to lead, manage, and grow Kimberly-Clark’s business on Ecommerce Platform. This role is responsible for developing long-term strategic partnerships, delivering sales growth, optimizing profitability, and building brand visibility on one of the most important e-commerce platforms in Vietnam.
The ideal candidate has strong experience in FMCG and/or E-commerce, excellent business acumen, and a proven track record of managing high-growth online channels.

2. Key Responsibilities
Account Management & Business Growth
• Own end-to-end P&L for online platform, ensuring revenue, profitability, and market share targets are met.
• Develop annual Joint Business Plans (JBP) with online platform, covering assortment, pricing, traffic, promotions, and branding.
• Drive daily, weekly, and monthly performance management to achieve GMV targets.
• Identify whitespace opportunities, portfolio gaps, and growth initiatives across all Kimberly-Clark categories.

Campaign, Promotion & Media Planning
• Plan and execute key mega campaigns (e.g., 2.2, 3.3, 4.4, 9.9, 11.11, 12.12).
• Optimize media spending, traffic-driving activities, and platform assets (KOLs, livestreams, visibility banners, search ads).
• Collaborate closely with marketing, supply chain, finance, and e-commerce operations teams to deliver flawless execution.

Operational Excellence
• Work with supply chain teams to ensure healthy stock levels, forecast accuracy, and on-time replenishment.
• Track and optimize platform operations such as delivery, return rate, seller rating, and customer experience metrics.
• Analyze sales data, traffic, conversion, and competitor benchmarking to generate insights and quick actions.

Relationship Management
• Build strong partnerships with Shopee category managers and cross-functional platform teams.
• Lead negotiations on terms, visibility packages, co-funding deals, and commercial agreements.

Role Purpose:

- To be a communicator between the company and its customers through personal selling
- To achieve agreed sales and collection targets;
- To manage and develop business of allocated sales territory by implementing sales plan, providing necessary supports to gain customer satisfaction.
- To maintain and develop relationship with customers

What you will do (Key Responsibilities):

Title: Employer Branding & Internal Communication (Ebic) Manager
Company: Crossian Việt Nam
Location: Tòa nhà Diamond Plaza, 34 Lê Duẩn, phường Bến Nghé, Hồ Chí Minh, Tầng 5, Pax Sky, 63-65 Ngô Thì Nhậm, Phường Phạm Đình Hổ, Quận Hai Bà Trưng, TP Hà Nội, Việt Nam
Job Description:
ABOUT THE ROLE
Crossian is a high-growth technology-driven e-commerce business. Behind our success is our people. As a start-up formed in 2020, we have created a fast-paced and dynamic environment, enabling our people to reach a cumulative average growth rate of over 1000% in just under 3 years. Our mission now is to build direct-to-consumer brands and increase customer lifetime value.

This role will bridge leadership vision with everyday employee experience, ensuring our purpose culture and learning culture are lived authentically — driving engagement, retention, alignment in a values-first environment.

WHAT YOU WILL DO

Internal Communication& Corporate Culture
- Define, evolve and embed the company’s core values, behaviors, rituals, and cultural principles in collaboration with leadership and employees
- Design and execute annual culture & engagement strategy (pulse surveys, culture diagnostics, focus groups, culture action plans)
- Lead signature culture programs (onboarding experience, recognition & appreciation systems, lifecycle moments, belonging & inclusion initiatives,….)
- Design and own the internal communication strategy, channels, and calendar
- Lead company-wide communication vehicles: all-hands meetings, newsletters, intranet / Slack / channels, BOD updates, town halls, leadership alignment sessions.

Employer Branding
- Own the internal employer brand experience — ensuring employees are authentic advocates and the lived experience matches the external promise.
- Collaborate closely with Talent Acquisition / Marketing on external employer branding campaigns, career site content, social media presence (LinkedIn, Glassdoor, etc.), and candidate experience.
- Develop internal storytelling and ambassador programs to turn employees into brand champions.
- Monitor employer brand perception (internally via surveys, externally via platforms) and drive continuous improvement.

Title: Creative Director
Company: Công ty TNHH Enzo & Leo
Location: 371/20 Hai Ba Trung Street, Xuân Hoà ward, Ho Chi Minh City, 371/20 Hai Bà Trưng, Phường Võ Thị Sáu, Quận 3, TPHCM
Job Description:
The Creative Director is responsible for defining and protecting the creative vision, aesthetic identity, and design direction of the brand. The role leads the development of seasonal collections, couture pieces, and market-adapted product lines while ensuring the brand maintains a strong, recognizable identity across all markets.
The Creative Director collaborates closely with Product Development to translate creative concepts into technically feasible products and works with Marketing to ensure brand storytelling is consistent across all communication channels.
This role is critical in maintaining Enzo & Leo’s positioning as a premium fashion brand while supporting growth in international markets.
I. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
1. Creative Vision & Brand Direction
• Define the overall creative direction and aesthetic vision of the brand.
• Develop seasonal concepts and themes for collections.
• Ensure brand identity remains consistent across all products, campaigns, and presentations.
• Protect and evolve the brand’s design language and visual identity.
• Maintain alignment with the brand’s premium positioning.
2. Collection Development
• Lead the development of Ready-to-Wear (RTW) collections.
• Oversee the design process from concept to final design approval.
• Ensure collections reflect both creative innovation and commercial relevance.
• Collaborate with Product Development to ensure designs are technically feasible.
• Participate in product review meetings during development phases.
3. Market Adaptation & International Strategy
• Adapt collections to meet the needs of different markets when required.
• Develop market-specific capsules (for example Middle East collections).
• Work with Commercial and Marketing teams to understand regional customer preferences.
• Ensure global expansion does not compromise the core brand identity.
4. Couture & Made-to-Order Direction
• Lead creative direction for Made-to-Order and couture pieces.
• Approve final design for bespoke and customized garments.
• Ensure couture pieces reflect high craftsmanship and brand prestige.
• Collaborate with the Atelier team for execution of complex designs.
5. Collaboration with Product Development
• Work closely with the Head of Product Development to translate design into production-ready products.
• Review samples and provide creative feedback during development stages.
• Ensure design intent is preserved through the technical development process.
• Participate in fitting sessions and approve final design aesthetics.
6. Brand Image & Creative Supervision
• Oversee visual direction for look books, fashion presentations, and campaigns.
• Provide creative input for brand storytelling and product presentation.
• Ensure consistency of visual language across all marketing materials.
• Collaborate with Marketing Manager on creative direction for campaigns and digital content.

Job Description:
Phong Nha Holiday is a distinctive member of The Oxalis Group, Vietnam’s leader in adventure tourism. We offer high-quality, sustainable experiences that showcase the natural beauty of Quang Binh and Viet Nam. Our portfolio includes Chay Lap Farmstay, a serene countryside haven, and Blue Diamond Retreat - a pioneering sustainable tourism model. In addition, we specialize in providing nature-connected tours and team-building programs tailored for organizations and corporate clients.

Our head office located in Phong Nha, part of the Phong Nha – Ke Bang National Park, a UNESCO World Natural Heritage Site, we also have representative office in Ho Chi Minh City.

Our properties
● Chay Lap Farmstay features 41 rooms. More details at: chaylapfarmstay.com
● Blue Diamond Retreat features 26 rooms. More details at: bluediamondretreat.com

Our services
● Package tours and M.I.C.E services in Quang Binh, Central Vietnam and Cat Tien National Park (Dong Nai).
● Land tour for travel agent partners.
More details at: phongnhaholiday.com

Position Summary
We are seeking a Sales Manager/Sales Executive based in HCM to be responsible for selling our hotel & tour products through B2C & B2B channels. Candidates should have a passion for travel and nature experiences, enjoy meeting and talking to customers, be eager to learn, and be willing to take on challenges. The ability to work independently as well as collaborate with related departments to provide the best service to customers is required.

Job Overview
● Job type: Full time
● Location: HCM Reprentative Office

Key responsibilities
● Prospecting and developing new customer sources, including corporate clients, schools, organizations, associations, and tour operators. Planning and implementing sales for this client segment.
● Maintain and develop relationships with clients, ensuring satisfaction and loyalty.
● Take responsibility for coordinating with relevant departments to deliver the best service to customers for assigned bookings.
● Working with sales team to develop product ideas and sales strategies.
● Other tasks assigned by Sales Director.

Title: Accounting Supervisor
Company: Navigos Search
Location: Center of Ho Chi Minh City, HCMC
Job Description:
Purpose of the role:
The Accounting Supervisor is responsible for overseeing general accounting activities and supervising accounting sections to ensure the accuracy and timeliness of financial data. This position also ensures compliance with Vietnamese accounting standards (VAS) and tax regulations.

Responsibilities:
• Supervise daily accounting activities to ensure smooth operations.
• Review accounting entries posted by subordinates before month-end closing to ensure accuracy and compliance with company policies and accounting standards.
• Record and review general journal entries and adjustment entries, including tax-related entries such as FCT and CIT when required.
• Review and reconcile all balance sheet accounts monthly and ensure consistency between sub-ledgers and the General Ledger (GL).
• Oversee inventory reconciliation and stock count processes in coordination with the warehouse and relevant departments.
• Review COGM allocation and calculate COGS. Analyze inventory fluctuation and cost variance.
• Prepare and submit statutory tax declarations including VAT, CIT, FCT, and other required tax reports in accordance with Vietnamese regulations.
• Coordinate and work with tax authorities, auditors, and other external parties when required.

Company: Công Ty Cổ Phần Nhà An Toàn
Location: Tầng 5, tòa 97-99 Láng Hạ, P.Láng Hạ, Q.Đống Đa, Trụ sở: Tầng 5, Tòa 97-99 Láng Hạ, Đống Đa, Hà Nội; Chi nhánh HCM: 299/3 Lý Thường Kiệt – Phường 15 – Quận 11 – TP.Hồ Chí Minh
Job Description:
Khi gia nhập Nhà An Toàn, bạn sẽ trở thành một phần của đội ngũ chuyên gia trong lĩnh vực phân phối thiết bị an ninh, thiết bị IT và thiết bị nhà thông minh tại Việt Nam.

Chúng tôi mang đến cho bạn cơ hội sáng tạo tương lai thông qua các công việc có ý nghĩa và văn hoá không ngừng đổi mới.

Nhà An Toàn mong muốn được chào đón những ứng viên có cùng chí hướng, quan điểm và phù hợp với văn hóa công ty. Hãy gia nhập đội ngũ của chúng tôi để cùng nhau xây dựng một tương lai bền vững.

Mục tiêu của vị trí này: Phát triển và thương mại hóa các giải pháp robot dịch vụ và công nghiệp, phát triển thị trường và xây dựng hệ thống khách hàng B2B tại Việt Nam.

• Quản lý, phát triển đội ngũ kinh doanh Robot: Sales, Kỹ thuật, Marketing.
• Nghiên cứu thị trường và xây dựng chiến lược kinh doanh cho sản phẩm robot phục vụ ngành nhà hàng, quán café và doanh nghiệp sản xuất tại Việt Nam - có sự hỗ trợ của đơn vị tư vấn.
• Xây dựng kế hoạch kinh doanh và tài chính cho bộ phận kinh doanh robot.
• Phát triển hệ thống khách hàng B2B

Title: [Hanoi] Korean Sales Executive | Fixed Monthly Salary | Annual Evaluation
Company: Nippon Sanso Vietnam JSC - Ha Noi Branch
Location: Prime Centre, 53 Quang Trung St., Nguyen Du, Hai Ba Trung Dist., Ha Noi, Viet Nam, 11/F, Prime Centre, 53 Quang Trung St., Hai Ba Trung Ward, Ha Noi, Viet Nam
Job Description:
Nippon Sanso Vietnam is expanding our business and is looking for a Sales Executive who is fluent in Korean and has a good command of English to join our B2B industrial gas sales team.

Our industrial gases are widely used in both industry and everyday life, for example:
- Oxygen (O₂) – breathing support in hospitals and medical facilities
- Nitrogen (N₂) – used in bottled beverages to maintain pressure and freshness, and in snack packaging to keep products crispy and prevent oxidation
- Argon (Ar) – welding, metal fabrication, and manufacturing processes
- Hydrogen (H₂) – chemical production, energy solutions, and various industrial applications

Your main tasks are:
- Approach potential Korean customers using company-provided customer data and leads, and actively expand new opportunities with team support
- Coordinate with Technical team to calculate project cost and prepare quotations before submitting to customers
- Participate in negotiation meetings
- Coordinate internal departments to implement new sales projects.
- Support documentation procedures (including EPZ import/export formalities) with related teams.
- Work with Purchasing team to source suppliers for new projects when required.
- Take care of assigned customers and maintain good relationships.
- Assist in contract follow-up, payment tracking and after-sales service.

Title: Australian Tax Accountant
Company: Goodland Outsourcing
Location: Nguyễn Lâm Tower, 133 Dương Bá Trạc, Phường 1, Quận 8, Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam, Tầng 10, Tòa nhà Nguyễn Lâm, 133 Dương Bá Trạc, Phường Rạch Ông, Quận 8, Tp HCM
Job Description:
Position Overview
Goodland BPO is looking for Accountants with experience in Australian tax & accounting to join our Finance & Accounting BPO team.
In this role, you will work directly with Australian Accounting Firms / Tax Agents and be responsible for preparing financial reporting and tax returns for different entity structures accurately and timely.
You will report to the Manager – Finance & Accounting BPO and collaborate closely with clients team and internal team members.

Key Responsibilities

Accounting & Taxation
• Collaborate with clients and internal teams to ensure all accounting and tax work is delivered accurately and on time.
• Prepare financial statements and income tax returns for:
o Individuals
o Trusts
o Partnerships
o Companies
o SMSF
• Prepare and lodge BAS / IAS, and assist with matters related to FBT, CGT, GST, Div7A, PSI.
• Prepare and deliver annual workers’ compensation and payroll tax reconciliations.
• Perform Virtual CFO services including:
o Payroll processing
o Accounts payable & receivable
o Bookkeeping
o Bank reconciliations and coding
o Management reporting
• Develop and maintain workflows, workpapers, templates, and procedures to ensure high-quality deliverables.
• Conduct virtual meetings with clients.

Team & Culture
• Promote and demonstrate the Goodland values and collaborative culture within the Finance & Accounting BPO team.

Other Responsibilities
• Assist in developing best practice policies, procedures, and workflow management systems.
• Participate in special projects as assigned.
• Perform ad-hoc tasks required by the client or reporting manager to meet project deliverables.

Title: Human Resource Intern
Company: Công Ty TNHH Giáo Dục Và Đào Tạo Vinacademy
Location: VinUniversity
Job Description:
ABOUT VINUNIVERSITY
VinUniversity (VinUni: https://vinuni.edu.vn/) is the first private, not-for-profit Vietnamese university established based on international standards. The university integrates the models of excellent international universities with the unique cultural and economic characteristics of Vietnam, to make a breakthrough in Vietnamese higher education and to become a world-class university.

VinUniversity has strategic collaborations with the world’s leading universities, including Cornell University and the University of Pennsylvania. These universities have become close advisors and crucial enablers in establishing the four colleges at VinUniversity: College of Arts and Sciences, College of Business and Management, College of Engineering and Computer Science, and College of Health Sciences. Every aspect of the University: its curricula, research, faculty, student body, facilities, and campus life, is being developed to meet the highest standards set by the world’s leading accrediting and ranking organizations, such as ABET, AACSB, Quacquarelli Symonds (QS) and Times Higher Education (THE).VinUniversity’s founding benefactor, Vingroup, is one of the biggest private conglomerates in Asia with the largest market capitalization value in Vietnam. As a multisector corporation, Vingroup focuses on three main areas: Technology; Industry; and Property Services. VinUniversity is proud to be a part of the Vingroup ecosystem, giving its students opportunities to connect with several high-quality research institutes (such as VinAI, and VinBigData), pioneering industrial enterprises (such as VinFast), and leading Vietnamese companies (such as Vinpearl, Vinmec, and Vinhomes).

JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

As a Human Resource Intern, you will assist the HR team in attracting, hiring, and onboarding top talent while also contributing to various HR operations. This role offers hands-on experience and a unique opportunity to engage in building a vibrant and attractive employer brand.

Recruitment & Onboarding Support
-Assist in drafting and publishing job descriptions on internal and external platforms.
- Screen resumes, coordinate interview schedules, and communicate with candidates.
- Support logistics for interviews and onboarding procedures.
- Help maintain recruitment databases and tracking sheets.

Other HR Support Tasks
- Assist in preparing HR reports, maintaining records, and updating documentation.
- Support other ad-hoc HR projects as needed.
- Assist in preparing and drafting different types of HR contracts (e.g., labor contracts, probation contracts, contract extensions) in accordance with company policies.
- Support the contract payment process, including preparing payment requests and coordinating with relevant departments to ensure timely and accurate contract payments.

Title: Merchandiser (Salary Up to 35,000,000 Vnd/month)
Company: Công Ty TNHH Case Concepts Vĩnh Long
Location: Vinh Long, Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam, Delta Mekong, Vietnam, Lô A3, KCN Hòa Phú, ấp Phước Hòa, Xã Phú Quới, Tỉnh Vĩnh Long, Việt Nam
Job Description:
Job Purpose
To manage the end-to-end merchandising process, ensuring timely execution of orders, coordination between Head office and production teams, and maintaining product quality and delivery schedules.

Key Responsibilities
1. Head Office (HO)-Facing Duties
• HO Communication: Serve as the primary contact for HO, clarifying requirements, specifications, and timelines.
• Sampling & Approvals: Coordinate development of samples, manage HO feedback, and secure approvals before production.
• Costing & Negotiation: Prepare cost sheets, negotiate prices, and ensure profitability while meeting buyer expectations.
• Order Documentation: Review purchase orders, maintain BOMs, and ensure all buyer instructions/ requirements/ restrictions are accurately documented.
• Delivery Coordination: Update HO on production status, shipment schedules, and resolve any concerns proactively.

2. Factory-Focused Duties
• BOM Management: Translate buyer requirements into detailed BOMs, ensuring accuracy in fabrics, trims, accessories, and packaging materials.
• Material Procurement: Work with sourcing/ purchasing teams to secure timely supply of raw materials and trims as per BOM.
• Production Monitoring: Track daily production progress, identify bottlenecks, and coordinate solutions with factory managers.
• QA & Compliance: Collaborate with QA teams to enforce buyer quality standards, conduct inline and final inspections, and ensure compliance with regulations.
• Pre-Production Coordination: Organize pre-production meetings to align all departments on buyer requirements and BOM details.
• Documentation & Reporting: Maintain production records, QA reports, and status updates for internal and HO review.
• Cross-Department Liaison: Act as the bridge between merchandising, production, sourcing, QA, and logistics teams to ensure smooth workflow.
• Work with R&D team to develop new styles, materials, and product concepts.
• Research fashion trends, fabrics, trims, and innovative techniques to propose fresh ideas to buyers.
• Create development BOMs for sampling and prototype stages.
• Coordinate sample development, ensuring alignment with buyer expectations and cost feasibility.
• Evaluate new suppliers and materials for potential integration into production.
• Support sustainability initiatives by exploring eco-friendly materials and processes.

Title: Compliance Associate
Company: Acclime Vietnam
Location: LIM Tower 3, 29A Nguyen Dinh Chieu, Sai Gon Ward, Ho Chi Minh City, Level 9, Lim Tower 3, 29A Nguyen Dinh Chieu, District 1, HCMC
Job Description:
In this role, you will support KYC (Know Your Customer) and KYB (Know Your Business) onboarding and operational processes across multiple markets. You will work closely with regional and global teams, ensuring adherence to compliance policies and regulatory standards.

1. KYC & KYB Onboarding & Operations:
- Oversee client onboarding processes, ensuring proper due diligence and KYC/KYB procedures are conducted according to internal policies and global regulatory standards.
- Review and validate customer identification documents, risk profiles, and screening results.
- Conduct KYB checks by verifying business registration documents, ownership structures, and assessing corporate risk levels.
- Monitor ongoing client and business due diligence, identifying any potential red flags or suspicious activities.

2. Compliance Monitoring & Advisory:
- Support the Group development and implementation of compliance frameworks, policies, and procedures.
- Conduct periodic compliance reviews and risk assessments to ensure alignment with local and international regulatory requirements.
- Advise internal stakeholders on compliance-related matters, ensuring business practices adhere to applicable laws and regulations.

3. Regulatory Reporting & Record Keeping:
- Prepare and submit regulatory reports as required and relevant global regulators.
- Maintain accurate records of compliance activities, audit findings, and remediation efforts.

4. Training & Awareness:
- Assist in developing and delivering compliance training programs for employees to promote a culture of compliance across the organization.
- Keep the team updated on emerging regulatory trends and industry best practices.

5. Cross-Border Collaboration:
- Work closely with regional and global compliance teams to ensure consistency in compliance standards and risk management practices.
- Support global initiatives by contributing to policy updates, system enhancements, and regulatory change management.

Title: Account Manager (DPPA And Bess, Solar Power)
Company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN NĂNG LƯỢNG VINENERGO
Location: Tòa văn phòng Symphony, Đường Chu Huy Mân, Khu đô thị Vinhomes Riverside, Phường Phúc Lợi, Quận Long Biên, Thành phố Hà Nội, Việt Nam, Tòa văn phòng Symphony, Đường Chu Huy Mân, Khu đô thị Vinhomes Riverside, Phường Phúc Lợi, Quận Long Biên, Thành phố Hà Nội, Việt Nam
Job Description:
The Account Manager is responsible for developing and managing relationships with industrial and FDI customers, supporting DPPA and renewable energy project development, and driving commercial negotiations for both physical and virtual DPPA models. The role works closely with technical, policy, and marketing teams to deliver tailored clean energy solutions.
Key responsibilities:
• Identify, approach, and qualify corporate customers for DPPA, rooftop solar, and utility scale renewable solutions.
• Lead customer engagement, presentations, site visits, and negotiation processes.
• Prepare commercial proposals, coordinate technical input, and support contract development.
• Maintain CRM discipline, manage the sales pipeline, and report on progress.
• Collaborate with cross functional teams to ensure timely project delivery.
• Support events, workshops, and outreach activities with industrial and FDI customers.

Title: Quản Lý Hợp Đồng Đấu Thầu (Ngành Năng Lượng Tái Tạo)
Company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN NĂNG LƯỢNG VINENERGO
Location: Tòa văn phòng Symphony, Đường Chu Huy Mân, Khu đô thị Vinhomes Riverside, Phường Phúc Lợi, Quận Long Biên, Thành phố Hà Nội, Việt Nam, Tòa văn phòng Symphony, Đường Chu Huy Mân, Khu đô thị Vinhomes Riverside, Phường Phúc Lợi, Quận Long Biên, Thành phố Hà Nội, Việt Nam
Job Description:
# Tổng quan về vị trí
VinEnergo là thành viên của Vingroup. Với sứ mệnh trở thành nhà đầu tư và phát triển năng lượng xanh toàn diện, đóng góp cho mục tiêu Net Zero của Việt Nam và khẳng định vị thế quốc gia trên bản đồ năng lượng toàn cầu. VinEnergo phát triển đa dạng các dự án năng lượng tái tạo với quy mô công suất lớn, ứng dụng công nghệ hiện đại và các tiêu chuẩn quốc tế, đồng thời nghiên cứu và đầu tư các hệ thống pin lưu trữ năng lượng (BESS) để mang lại những giải pháp năng lượng toàn diện, đảm bảo cung cấp một hệ sinh thái năng lượng sạch – bền vững – toàn diện cho hôm nay và cho các thế hệ mai sau.

Vị trí Quản lý Hợp đồng Đấu thầu là người chịu trách nhiệm chính về quản lý hợp đồng của các dự án, có trình độ chuyên môn cao, kinh nghiệm lâu năm về quản lý hợp đồng, có chứng chỉ chuyên môn về đấu thầu, quản lý dự án để thực hiện các nhiệm vụ tham gia lập, thẩm định HSMT, HSYC, tham gia thương thảo Hợp đồng, chủ trì điều hành làm việc với các nhà thầu về tiến độ, chất lượng, khối lượng, nghiệm thu, thanh toán, thương thảo điều chỉnh hợp đồng, giải quyết các thủ tục tranh chấp hợp đồng.

Nhiệm vụ và trách nhiệm chính

1. Công việc thường xuyên:

• Chủ trì lập kế hoạch tài chính; Tham gia công tác đấu thầu;

• Chủ trì lập, đàm phán và quản lý Hợp đồng;

• Phối hợp theo dõi, cập nhật, báo cáo tiến độ dự án;

• Lập hồ sơ thanh toán và kế hoạch chi phí dự án;

• Phối hợp, theo dõi đối chiếu công nợ, kiểm soát các Hợp đồng với nhà thầu, đơn vị cung cấp liên quan đến dự án;

• Lập các Báo cáo quản trị theo tuần/tháng (chi phí, doanh thu, dòng tiền) theo công việc được giao quản lý;

• Kiểm soát bộ hồ sơ chứng từ, hồ sơ thanh toán trước khi trình kí.

2. Công việc đấu thầu và quản lý Hợp đồng:

• Lập kế hoạch triển khai mời thầu theo kế hoạch đấu thầu được duyệt.

• Lập hồ sơ mời thầu và chủ trì đấu thầu, chấm thầu và trình phê duyệt kết quả.

• Bóc tách chi tiết, kiểm tra giá dự thầu, thực hiện công tác báo cáo theo chỉ đạo của quản lý phòng.

• Tham gia thương thảo, đàm phán và soạn thảo Hợp đồng và trình Lãnh đạo phòng, Khối và Công ty duyệt.

• Tổ chức theo dõi, giám sát tiến độ thực hiện dự án của Nhà thầu và các đối tác tham gia dự án đảm bảo tiến độ từng giai đoạn thiết kế, mua sắm, lắp đặt, chạy thử, nghiệm thu và tiến độ tổng thể thực hiện dự án.

• Tổ chức quản lý, theo dõi các Hợp đồng của dự án, bao gồm cả các mốc thanh toán, quá trình thực hiện, các phát sinh ảnh hưởng đến tiến độ/chi phí (nếu có) và công tác thanh quyết toán các Hợp đồng.

• Xử lý các vấn đề tranh chấp, phát sinh trong quá trình thực hiện các Hợp đồng.

• Theo dõi, đánh giá và đôn đốc tiến độ thi công nhằm đảm bảo tiến độ.

3. Kiểm tra, đánh giá tổng thể:

• Cập nhật tiến độ dự án, tiến độ thanh toán.

• Phối hợp, tham gia kiểm tra, đánh giá chất lượng công tác dự án, công tác thi công, chất lượng công trình.

• Lập và phối hợp công tác hồ sơ thanh toán, quyết toán của dự án.

• Quản lý công tác lưu trữ hồ sơ trong phạm vi quản lý.

• Phối hợp chặt chẽ với các Phòng/ Khối nghiệp vụ, chức năng có liên quan nhằm triển khai thực hiện dự án một cách hiệu quả nhất.

4. Thực hiện các nhiệm vụ khác do lãnh đạo phân công.

Company: PepsiCo Foods Vietnam Company
Location: Số 3-4-5, Đường số 2, KCN Sóng Thần 3, Thành phố Thủ Dầu Một, Bình Dương, No. 3-4-5 Lot CN2, Street No. 2, Song Than 3 IP, Thu Dau Mot City, Binh Duong
Job Description:
1. Vận hành
a) Thực hiện việc giao nhận ca cụ thể, chi tiết theo danh mục đã được quy định vào đầu, cuối mỗi ca.
b) Vận hành thiết bị được phân công trong khu vực chế biến để thực hiện kế hoạch sản xuất hàng ngày theo đúng quy trình. Kiểm tra tình trạng vận hành ổn định, an toàn của thiết bị trong ca làm việc.
c) Kiểm tra chất lượng sản phẩm tại vị trí được phân công bao gồm: kiểm PAE cho sản phẩm, kiểm độ dày lát cắt khoai tây, kiểm hàm lượng ẩm, muối….theo tần suất quy định trong quá trình sản xuất.
d) Vệ sinh thiết bị, nhà xưởng theo quy trình vệ sinh sau khi sản xuất và theo kế hoạch vệ sinh của nhà máy.
e) Giám sát việc tuân thủ các nội quy, quy định của nhân viên nhà thầu, nhân viên 3rd party… trong khu vực làm việc và báo cáo khi có trường hợp vi phạm cho Tổ trưởng sản xuất khu vực chế biết hoặc giám sát sản xuất.
f) Tuân thủ các quy trình làm việc, quy định về: an toàn lao động, GMP, Bảo vệ môi trường, 5S….. nhằm đạt được các chỉ tiêu kiểm soát (KPIs) trong khu vực sản xuất.
2. Báo cáo
a) Ghi chép đầy đủ, chính xác, đúng tần suất các thông số vận hành thiết bị, kết quả kiểm tra chất lượng sản phẩm, số lượng nguyên vật liệu đã sử dụng trong ca… vào các biểu mẫu báo cáo.
b) Báo cáo ngay các sự cố phát sinh trong ca sản xuất cho tổ trưởng sản xuất khu vực chế biến hoặc giám sát sản xuất
3. Khác
• Đề xuất các cải tiến hay tham gia các nhóm dự án (nếu có) nhằm nâng cao năng suất lao động, giảm chi phí sản xuất, nâng cao hiệu quả sản xuất.

Title: Production Planner (CNC Manufacturing)
Company: LEMBAK VIETNAM LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
Job Description:
The Production Planner is responsible for creating, maintaining, and adjusting production schedules to ensure that manufacturing activities meet delivery deadlines and customer requirements. This role involves close coordination with production, warehouse, and purchasing teams to ensure the availability of materials, tools, and consumables. The planner also prepares and maintains Bills of Materials (BOM) for all product codes and continuously monitors actual progress against the plan to make timely adjustments.

Our company does not have an ERP at this time. We expect to purchase this later this year. We are currently using Excel spreadsheets for this task. Candidate must be fluent with the use of using Excel.

Key Responsibilities
• Create, issue, and update production plan based on PO, inventory, and shipment schedules.
• Monitor daily production performance and compare actual output versus the production plan; identify deviations and propose corrective actions.
• Coordinate with production, warehouse, and purchasing teams to ensure on-time availability of raw materials, tools, and consumables to support smooth production flow.
• Prepare and maintain Bills of Materials (BOM) for all product codes that ensure accuracy and completeness, as well as provide BOM prior to each shipment for Export Department.
• Proactively manage production issues and develop contingency plans if raw materials or other inputs are delayed.
• Coordinate with the Warehouse to monitor and manage WIP to support the production plan.
• Review and adjust plans in response to changes in delivery schedules, machine availability, manpower, or material constraints.
• Work closely with engineering to ensure that new or revised product data (e.g., BOM, cycle time) are correctly
• Follow up on purchase orders for production materials and tools, ensuring that suppliers deliver in accordance with required timelines.
• Analyze production capacity, identify bottlenecks, and propose solutions to optimize production efficiency and lead time.
• It is part of the job of the Production Planner to manage the materials required based on the production plan and let Purchasing know within the lead times that we adhere to. Long lead time items must be watched carefully to ensure we place orders on time to prevent stock out.
• Perform other related duties or tasks assigned by supervisors.

Title: Content Marketing Executive
Company: Công ty TNHH Thương Mại JEN&CO
Location: 59d A Cư Xá Phú Thọ Hòa, phường 3, Quận 11, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam, 59d Lô D Lạc Long Quân, phường 5, Quận 11, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam
Job Description:
MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC

1. Sản xuất nội dung đa nền tảng
• Lên ý tưởng và xây dựng nội dung cho các kênh: Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Website, Email…
• Viết bài PR, bài SEO, nội dung bán hàng (product content), nội dung branding theo từng chiến dịch.
• Xây dựng kịch bản video ngắn (TikTok/Reels/Shorts) và phối hợp với Media/Designer để sản xuất.
• Biên tập nội dung hình ảnh, video, caption, tagline đảm bảo đúng tone & voice thương hiệu.
• Phối hợp cùng designer, photographer để sản xuất nội dung hình ảnh/video phục vụ kênh ads và sàn.
• Cập nhật liên tục xu hướng thời trang nội dung quốc tế và đề xuất các hướng sáng tạo phù hợp cho từng thị trường mục tiêu.

2. Chiến dịch Marketing & Thương mại điện tử
• Phối hợp với Marketing, E-commerce và Product để triển khai kế hoạch nội dung cho các campaign: Mega Sale, ra mắt BST/SKU mới, Promotion,...
• Viết nội dung phục vụ hoạt động sàn TMĐT: mô tả sản phẩm, banner content, kịch bản livestream, nội dung landing page.
• Theo dõi và tối ưu hiệu suất nội dung dựa trên insight từ sàn và social.

3. Booking quảng cáo & quản lý ngân sách:

Title: International Sales Specialist B2B
Company: TurnKey FBA
Location: Block N1, No.5+6, 655 Alley, Lac Long Quan, Tay Ho, Ha Noi, Vietnam, Ngõ 655 Đường Lạc Long Quân, Xuân La, Tây Hồ, Hà Nội, Việt Nam
Job Description:
About Us:
TurnKey FBA is a fast-growing Amazon & TikTok consultant agency helping e-commerce brands and sellers succeed globally. We blend data, creativity, and high energy to build standout businesses.
We’re expanding our Vietnam team and looking for a Sales Specialist whose performance directly drives real business impact. You’ll have the opportunity to build global client relationships, shape how brands grow online, and advance quickly in a team that values ownership and results.

What You'll Do:
1. Client Acquisition & Sales Growth
● Identify, approach, and qualify prospective clients to provide Amazon or eCommerce management and growth services.
● Present and pitch our service offerings clearly to brand representatives, highlighting value, outcomes, and ROI.
● Negotiate service scope, pricing, and timelines to successfully close deals.
● Consistently meet or exceed monthly revenue and conversion targets.

2. Relationship & Pipeline Management
● Maintain accurate and updated sales pipelines, proposals, and client communication records.
● Coordinate closely with the operations team to ensure a seamless handover and client onboarding process.
● Actively participate in networking, industry events, and business meetings to generate leads and expand the sales pipeline.

3. Market Knowledge & Continuous Learning
● Stay informed about Amazon and eCommerce trends, competitor offerings, and industry best practices.
● Actively share feedback with internal teams to improve service offerings and client experience.

Title: HO - Khối TT & QTTC - Chuyên Gia Quản Trị Tài Chính KHDN
Company: Ngân hàng Lộc Phát Việt Nam LPBank
Location: LPB Tower Số 210 Trần Quang Khải, Phường Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội, LPB Tower, số 210 đường Trần Quang Khải, Phường Hoàn Kiếm, Thành phố Hà Nội
Job Description:
Mô tả công việc
1. Xây dựng và quản lý kế hoạch kinh doanh:
• Phối hợp với Kế hoạch tài chính toàn hàng trong việc xây dựng, điều chỉnh KHKD của NHDN ở cấp độ Khối: xây dựng kế hoạch top-down và đánh giá kế hoạch bottom-up từ Khối để đề xuất đóng gap.
• Phối hợp với NHDN xây dựng KHKD chi tiết theo sản phẩm, phân bổ đến Vùng, ĐVKD; giám sát tình hình thực tế, phân tích đánh giá và đề xuất các biện pháp cải thiện hiệu quả kinh doanh và các chỉ số tài chính.
• Hỗ trợ mẫu biểu Account Planning để xây dựng kế hoạch chi tiết cho KHDNL;
• Định kỳ hỗ trợ khối rà soát và điều chỉnh Kế hoạch Kinh doanh, phù hợp với các kỳ điều chỉnh kế hoạch kinh doanh toàn hàng.
2. Quản trị hiệu quả hoạt động kinh doanh
• Xây dựng hệ thống báo cáo quản trị chuyên sâu và đa chiều để đánh giá hiệu quả hoạt động của NHDN như: Các báo cáo đánh giá hiệu quả (doanh số/doanh thu/ chi phí/lợi nhuận) theo phân khúc khách hàng, sản phẩm, kênh bán hàng, ĐVKD….
• Thực hiện công tác cảnh báo, phân tích xu hướng và phối hợp với NHDN dự báo kết quả kinh doanh định kỳ.
• Thực hiện các báo cáo phân tích theo chuyên đề và đưa ra các đề xuất/ khuyến nghị hành động để tối ưu doanh thu/lợi nhuận cho NHDN.
3. Kiểm soát và đánh giá hiệu quả tài chính:
• Xây dựng và thẩm định các mô hình tài chính đánh giá chi phí/lợi ích của sản phẩm mới, chương trình marketing, và chính sách kinh doanh.
• Rà soát, đánh giá hiệu quả các sản phẩm, chương trình thúc đẩy kinh doanh và chi phí liên quan.
4. Quản lý chi phí và kiểm soát ngân sách:
• Thẩm định và kiểm soát các chi phí kinh doanh và marketing của NHDN, đảm bảo tối ưu hiệu quả và nguồn lực.
5. Tối ưu hóa các quy định, quy trình, hướng dẫn liên quan đến hoạt động Quản trị hiệu quả NHDN.
6. Đào tạo/Chia sẻ/hỗ trợ các bạn chuyên viên/chuyên viên chính/chuyên viên cao cấp trong phát triển năng lực chuyên môn và kỹ năng nghiệp vụ.
7. Thực hiện các nhiệm vụ khác theo sự phân công của cấp trên.

Job Description:
- Xây dựng các nguyên tắc quản trị dữ liệu liên quan đến chuyên môn nghiệp vụ tài chính, bảng dữ liệu tài chính (datamart), các từ điển dữ liệu tài chính.
- Quản lý danh mục master data, các bảng mapping dữ liệu, các bộ code liên quan đến Khối Thị trường và Quản trị tài chính (TT&QTTC)
- Tiếp nhận và tổng hợp yêu cầu phát triển về bảng dữ liệu, báo cáo, sản phẩm dịch vụ CNTT từ các Đơn vị trong Khối TT&QTTC
- Phân tích yêu cầu, hoàn thiện tài liệu phân tích, phân tích kiểm thử và xây dựng, tự động hóa, cung cấp các bảng dữ liệu định kỳ làm đầu vào cho các báo cáo phân tích của Khối Tài chính theo yêu cầu của các Đơn vị Nghiệp vụ thuộc Khối TT&QTTC

Title: Packaging Design Engineer
Company: Spin Master (Vietnam) Company Limited
Location: Tầng 4, số 4, Lô 22A Lê Hồng Phong, Đông Khê, Ngô Quyền, Hải Phòng, https://www.spinmaster.com/en-US/
Job Description:
Are you a kid at heart looking to build a career with a leading global children's toy, entertainment and digital gaming company?

We are growing faster than ever! Spin Master is expanding its team and opening numerous positions across multiple departments. If you are looking for an exciting career move, submit your CV today to be considered for an interview. Successful candidates will have their start dates arranged in coordination with our ongoing expansion timeline!

What will you work on?

Carry out packaging structural design and improvement works to achieve optimum materials usage, cube efficiency and packing costs

How will you create impact?

• Make packaging structural design recommendations and/or solutions. Consider materials usage, packaging cube (size) and packing labor contents.
• Communicate packaging structural design proposals and resolve packaging structural issues with head office and regional offices.
• Provide packaging materials, dimension and performance specifications
• Work closely with project engineering team to support key project milestone dates and ensure project start production on time.
• Work with printer and manufacturing vendor to provide packaging structural cost estimates
• Coordinate and address related packaging issues between printer and manufacturing vendor
• Verify and approve packaging structural sample (PPSR) before production start
• Propose various packaging alternatives to project engineering team. Strive to achieve best cost benefits.
• Support company sustainability initiatives to reduce plastics usage. Look for environmental friendly packaging structural design options when applicable.
• Carry out other related works assigned by supervisor such as packaging data collection, photo shooting, carton dimension checking, etc..
